Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Cosmic Path]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 7''' — The Cosmic Path is a pinnacle spell of navigational magic used for precise starship navigation at high speeds in space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 42''' — Cosmic Path is a spell used to reach a specific destination.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 48''' — The Captain cast the Cosmic Path.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 26''' — The Cosmic Path is the pinnacle spell of the Captain's navigational magic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 27''' — Cosmic Path is a spell that emits golden light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 28''' — Cosmic Path is a magic spell that creates golden Aetheric symbols.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 5''' — The Cosmic Path is a concept or path that can reach through Subspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 15''' — The narrator has the Cosmic Path active.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — The Cosmic Path is a route that appears as an unbroken golden road in the darkness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — Cosmic Path is a spell that can be severed or cut off.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 16''' — The Cosmic Path is a chant used while flying.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — The Cosmic Path is something Omega should follow if it returns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 29''' — The Cosmic Path is a spell that allows for navigating out of a system.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
